narrative:
DRIVER
CHF leads H4 CSM at 100 versus D1 at 33, a 67-point divergence that is the single most important short-term signal in this brief, overriding the D1 risk-off USD dominance narrative as CHF accelerates intraday against a fading dollar impulse. USDCHF is the primary expression given the -0.88 EURUSD correlation confirming broad USD softness on the short timeframe, with EURCHF and GBPCHF offering secondary entries as CHF strength extends across the board. USD D1 CSM at 100 versus H4 at 44 confirms the fade is real and not noise.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: GBPJPY CMP 54 with H4 at 66 accelerating, AUDJPY CMP 59 D1 and H4 aligned rising, NZDJPY CMP 58 H4 65 pushing higher
Fading: EURUSD D1 momentum 32 dropping sharply, GBPUSD D1 29 dropping sharply

WATCH
Japanese yen intervention risk near USDJPY 160 triggers immediate JPY bid collapsing CADJPY which already prints H4 strong sell at -4. ECB June hike signalling hits EURCHF directly, conflicting with CHF acceleration and creating a compression trade to fade on break. Copper at 6.358 up 1.6 percent on geopolitical de-escalation drives AUDUSD H4 CSM 70 continuation long toward prior resistance.

themes.theme: Fed Policy Divergence and Later Easing Narrative
US Dollar Carry Support from High Yields
ECB Hawkish Tilt with June Hike Signals
US-Iran Deal Optimism Supporting Risk Assets
Oil Price Pressure from Geopolitical De-escalation
RBI Supporting Indian Rupee Against Record Lows
RBA Hawkish Bets Fading Weighs on AUD
GBP Resilience Despite Fiscal Concerns and Weak Data
Swiss Franc Benefiting from ECB Uncertainty

key_observation: Market narrative split between Fed easing expectations supporting USD weakness and persistent carry support from elevated yields. US-Iran diplomatic progress is driving risk-on sentiment with equity rebounds and oil price weakness. ECB hawkish signals are supporting EUR and CHF strength despite policy divergence with Fed. BoJ intervention risks near 160 limiting JPY weakness.
watch: Fed's Warsh swearing-in ceremony for policy signals; US-Iran negotiation progress; ECB June hike probability; BoJ intervention at 160 level; RBI rupee support capacity; Oil price reaction to geopolitical developments
